title: Add Mermaid state diagram for ownership lifecycle
description: ferrum-introduction-to-ownership.md currently explains the Created→Moved→Invalid ownership lifecycle and the shared/exclusive borrow rules in prose. These are the hardest concepts in the doc. A stateDiagram showing valid state transitions (owned, shared-borrowed, exclusively-borrowed, moved/invalid) and why 'never both at the same time' holds would give readers a concrete mental model before the code examples.
